context: This scenario checks whether the agent applies the meta-skill's release rules when user-visible guidance, references, and eval behavior changed after the last published version.

checklist.name: requires version bump
checklist.description: Clearly says a version bump is needed because published behavior or eval behavior changed.

checklist.name: default patch semantics
checklist.description: Chooses a patch bump by default and identifies the target version as 1.4.3.

checklist.name: requires release tags
checklist.description: Says Tessl release tags should be created after the bump, not skipped.

checklist.name: common validation commands
checklist.description: Mentions the common Tessl checks before publish: `skill lint ./tile.json`, `skill review --json .`, and `skill publish --dry-run .`.
